name: Cannondramon

signature_move.name: Dyna Cannon
signature_move.description: Fires beams from the three cannons on its back.

description: A Cyborg type Digimon equipped with long-distance cannons. Covered in tough armor, it greets approaching enemies with a swing of its tail. Its Signature Move is random-firing grenades from the gun on its front ( Grenade Storm ). Its Special Move is firing its cannons while stationed at an area where enemy attacks cannot reach ( Dyna Cannon ).
